no: Still in Alpha (Alpha 3, Oct 2024). Install first in both BG1EE and BG2EE. Must be manually installed on BG1EE before EET — mod_installer and PI cannot reliably handle dual-install. Three components: Core Fixes (essential), Beta Core Fixes (additional fixes, MiH FR requires it), Game Text Update (text corrections, minor cosmetic issues with some older mods). All three recommended for Ultimate preset.
rq: Unreleased, install at your own risk on BG2, needs EET Master until new version.

in.t: Install EE Fixpack manually via WeiDU on both BG1EE and BG2EE before running the automated installer.

sum: Community-driven fix compilation that corrects hundreds of bugs the official patches missed in BG1EE, SoD, BG2EE, and ToB. Still in beta but widely recommended.

eet_compat.notes: Must be installed on BOTH BGEE and BG2EE

co.no: Essential. Fixes hundreds of bugs across all EE games.
Additional fixes still in testing. MiH Fixes & Restorations requires this component. Recommended.
Corrects game text errors. Minor cosmetic issues possible with older mods not adapted to EE Fixpack text changes. Recommended.
